An entity type within a labeled training dataset that Amazon Comprehend uses to train a custom entity recognizer.

comprehend.flywheel.entitytypeslistitem..Description: An entity type within a labeled training dataset that Amazon Comprehend uses to train a custom entity recognizer.  Entity types must not contain the following invalid characters: n (line break), n (escaped line break, r (carriage return), r (escaped carriage return), t (tab), t (escaped tab), space, and , (comma).
